column1: #   2. /File New After to start fresh; save a second xlsx with A1=22.
#   3. /File Retrieve the first → only file A is "active".
#   4. /File Open After → load file B as a second active file.
#   5. Ctrl-End arms the FILE-navigation prefix.  The FILE indicator
#   6. Ctrl-PgDn while armed rotates to file B.  A1 reads 22.
#   7. Ctrl-End then Ctrl-PgDn again rotates back to A.  A1 reads 11.
# --- fresh file; build B on disk ---
# --- /FOA loads B alongside; current view stays on A ---
# --- Ctrl-End arms the FILE prefix; indicator visible ---
# --- Ctrl-PgDn while armed swaps to file B ---
# --- Ctrl-End + Ctrl-PgDn again rotates back to A ---
